items.title: Natural Healing
items.description: A foundational guide to natural healing principles, holistic care, and lifestyle-based wellness approaches.

items.title: Cancer Support Herbal Garden
items.description: A practical, compassionate guide to cultivating and using supportive herbal remedies for those facing cancer and chronic illness.

items.title: Immunity & Vitality: Strengthening Your Body Naturally
items.description: A comprehensive 135-page premium wellness manual focused on strengthening the immune system naturally. Covers nutrition, herbal allies, detox strategies, lifestyle optimization, stress management, sleep science, and long-term vitality building for individuals and families.

items.title: Mind-Body Wellness: Stress Reduction & Emotional Balance
items.description: An extensive 135-page guide to mental clarity, emotional resilience, and holistic stress reduction. Integrates practical lifestyle strategies, natural support methods, mindfulness principles, and sustainable routines for long-term emotional and physical balance.

items.title: Home Health & Emergency Survival Guide
items.description: A practical mini booklet on how to handle everyday health issues and emergencies using basic natural remedies.

items.title: The Healing Kitchen
items.description: A practical guide to using simple everyday foods as natural daily support for energy, recovery, and overall well-being.
